name: Can Defeat Magical Enemy
requires: |Any Tier 2 Spell| OR |Any Tier 3 Spell| OR |Any Tier 4 Spell| OR |Has Mid Attack|

name: Any Tier 2 Spell
requires: |Can Cast Clusterbomb| OR |Can Cast Icicle Edge| OR |Can Cast Blitz|

name: Any Tier 3 Spell
requires: |Can Cast Fire Wall| OR |Can Cast Tornado| OR |Can Cast Meteor Impact|

name: Any Tier 4 Spell
requires: |Can Summon Salamander| OR |Can Summon Aqua| OR |Can Summon Sylphie| OR |Can Summon Golem|

name: Has Mid Attack
requires: {YamlEnabled(tough_logic)} OR ({YamlDisabled(tough_logic)} AND |Has High Attack| OR (({YamlEnabled(progressive_equipment)} AND |Progressive Glove:3|) OR {YamlDisabled(progressive_equipment)} AND (|Silver Gauntlet| OR |White Gauntlet|)))

name: Has High Attack
requires: ({YamlEnabled(tough_logic)} AND |Has Mid Attack|) OR ({YamlDisabled(tough_logic)} AND ({YamlEnabled(progressive_equipment)} AND |Progressive Glove:5|) OR {YamlDisabled(progressive_equipment)} AND (|Rocket Glove| OR |Dragon Buster| OR |Star Glove|))

name: Has Mid Defense
requires: {YamlEnabled(tough_logic)} OR ({YamlDisabled(tough_logic)} AND |Has High Defense| OR (({YamlEnabled(progressive_equipment)} AND |Progressive Shield:3|) OR {YamlDisabled(progressive_equipment)} AND (|Big Shield| OR |Knight's Shield|)))

name: Has High Defense
requires: ({YamlEnabled(tough_logic)} AND |Has Mid Defense|) OR ({YamlDisabled(tough_logic)} AND ({YamlEnabled(progressive_equipment)} AND |Progressive Shield:5|) OR {YamlDisabled(progressive_equipment)} AND (|Legendary Shield| OR |TH Shield|))

name: Has Mid Magic Attack
requires: {YamlEnabled(tough_logic)} OR ({YamlDisabled(tough_logic)} AND |Has High Magic Attack| OR (({YamlEnabled(progressive_equipment)} AND |Progressive Staff:3|) OR {YamlDisabled(progressive_equipment)} AND (|Pretty Wand| OR |Cane Staff|)))

name: Has High Magic Attack
requires: ({YamlEnabled(tough_logic)} AND |Has Mid Magic Attack|) OR ({YamlDisabled(tough_logic)} AND ({YamlEnabled(progressive_equipment)} AND |Progressive Staff:5|) OR {YamlDisabled(progressive_equipment)} AND (|Spirit Staff| OR |Divine Staff|))

name: Has High Magic Defense
requires: ({YamlEnabled(tough_logic)} AND |Has Mid Magic Defense|) OR ({YamlDisabled(tough_logic)} AND ({YamlEnabled(progressive_equipment)} AND |Progressive Charm:5|) OR {YamlDisabled(progressive_equipment)} AND (|Miracle Charm| OR |Omnicharm|))

name: Can Cast Clusterbomb
requires: ({YamlCompare(spellsanity <= 1)})OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Clusterbomb|)

name: Can Cast Icicle Edge
requires: ({YamlCompare(spellsanity <= 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Icicle Edge|)

name: Can Cast Blitz
requires: ({YamlCompare(spellsanity <= 1)})OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Blitz|)

name: Can Cast Super Armor
requires: ({YamlCompare(spellsanity <= 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Super Armor|)

name: Can Cast Fire Wall
requires: (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 0)}) OR (((|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Fire Wall|)

name: Can Cast Heal
requires: (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 0)}) OR (((|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Heal|)

name: Can Cast Tornado
requires: (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 0)}) OR (((|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Tornado|)

name: Can Cast Meteor Impact
requires: (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 0)}) OR (((|Progressive Spell Upgrade:1| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Meteor Impact|)

name: Can Summon Salamander
requires: (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 0)}) OR (((|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:3| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Salamander|)

name: Can Summon Aqua
requires: (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 0)}) OR (((|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:3| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Aqua|)

name: Can Summon Sylphie
requires: (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 0)}) OR (((|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:3| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Sylphie|)

name: Can Summon Golem
requires: (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 0)}) OR (((|Progressive Spell Upgrade:2| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 1)}) OR (|Progressive Spell Upgrade:3| AND {YamlCompare(spellsanity == 2)})) AND |Golem|)
